indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or personal items
indicators.rationale: The kitchen is devoid of furniture or personal items, which are typically associated with a living space.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: The lack of windows or curtains means there is no source of natural light or privacy.

indicators.name: no acoustic enclosure
indicators.rationale: The open layout and hard surfaces suggest a noisy environment, which is incompatible with sleep.

reasoning_summary: This kitchen is not suitable for sleep. It lacks a bed or resting surface, personal items, windows or curtains, and acoustic enclosure, making it unsuitable for sleep.
